title: Rajasthan BSTC Pre DELED 2026 Exam Date

detail.title: Rajasthan BSTC Pre DELED 2026 Exam Date
detail.short_info: Rajasthan BSTC Pre DELED 2026 exam date is 20 May 2026. Check exam schedule, eligibility, syllabus, exam pattern, application dates and official predeledraj2026.com links here.

sections.heading: Rajasthan BSTC Pre DELED 2026 Exam Date

content.text: Vardhaman Mahaveer Open University (VMOU), Kota has confirmed that the Rajasthan BSTC (Pre D.El.Ed) 2026 entrance exam will be conducted on 20 May 2026 in offline mode across various exam centres in the state. This entrance test is held for candidates seeking admission to the 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education (D.El.Ed - General and Sanskrit) in government and private teacher training institutes of Rajasthan.

Candidates who have successfully submitted their application form on the official Pre DELED portal should now focus on revision, previous year papers and time management to perform well on the exam day. The detailed schedule, including exam timing and reporting time, is provided in the official exam date notice and will also be mentioned on the admit card.

sections.heading: Rajasthan BSTC Pre DELED 2026 Overview

content.text: The key details of the Rajasthan Pre D.El.Ed 2026 exam are given below for quick reference.

rows: Diploma in Elementary Education (D.El.Ed - General & Sanskrit)

sections.heading: Rajasthan BSTC Pre DELED 2026 Important Dates

content.text: This section helps candidates track all major events related to the exam.

rows: As per official Pre DELED 2026 brochure
To be notified by VMOU Kota

sections.heading: Rajasthan BSTC Pre DELED 2026 Eligibility Criteria

content.text: Before appearing for the exam, candidates must ensure they meet the eligibility conditions mentioned in the official notification.

rows: Candidates must have passed Class 12 (10+2) or equivalent from a recognised board with the required minimum marks as per their category.
Minimum Marks - OBC / MBC / EWS & Other Reserved Categories
Percentage criteria are mentioned in the Pre D.El.Ed prospectus and notification.
Students appearing in Class 12 in 2026 are also eligible to apply, subject to fulfilling all conditions during counselling and admission.
Upper age limit is generally 28 years for Rajasthan BSTC Pre DELED 2026.
Relaxation for reserved categories as per Rajasthan state government rules.

sections.heading: Rajasthan BSTC Pre DELED 2026 Exam Pattern

content.text: Understanding the exam pattern helps in making an effective study plan.

items: Mode of exam: Offline OMR-based written exam.
Type of questions: Multiple-choice questions (MCQs).
Total questions: 200 questions.
Total marks: 600 marks (each question carries 3 marks).
Duration: 3 hours.
Negative marking: As per the latest pattern, there is no negative marking in the exam.

sections.heading: Section-wise exam structure

content.text: The detailed syllabus includes topics from reasoning, Rajasthan GK, teaching aptitude and languages, and candidates should prepare each section according to the prescribed syllabus.

sections.heading: Rajasthan BSTC Pre DELED 2026 Application Process

content.text: The Rajasthan Pre DELED 2026 application form is accepted only in online mode through the official portal.

items: Candidates have to complete registration, fill the application form, upload scanned documents and pay the application fee within the specified dates.
Applications submitted after the last date or with incomplete information may be rejected without any intimation.

content.text: Step-by-step to apply online at predeledraj2026.com

items: Visit the official website of Rajasthan Pre DELED at predeledraj2026.com.
On the homepage, click on the link “Pre D.El.Ed 2026 Online Application” or similar under the latest notification or examination section.
Complete new registration by entering your name, mobile number, email ID, date of birth and other basic details to generate a registration ID and password.
Log in using your registration credentials and fill in all required information such as personal details, category, address and academic qualifications carefully.
Upload your recent passport size photograph and signature as per the prescribed size and format mentioned in the instructions.
Select your preferred D.El.Ed course (General/Sanskrit) and choose exam centre options according to your convenience.
Pay the application fee online using net banking, debit/credit card or UPI as per the fee structure given in the notification.
After successful payment, submit the application form and download/print the confirmation page for future reference.

sections.heading: How to Download Rajasthan BSTC Pre DELED 2026 Exam Date Notification PDF

content.text: Candidates often search for the direct exam date PDF to verify the official schedule. You can guide them with simple steps.

items: Open the official Rajasthan Pre DELED website (predeledraj2026.com) in your browser.
Go to the “Latest News”, “Notifications” or “Exam Notices” section on the homepage.
Find and click the link titled “Rajasthan BSTC Pre D.El.Ed Exam Date 2026” or similar.
The exam date notification PDF will open in a new tab; check the exam date (20 May 2026), exam time and important instructions mentioned there.
Download the PDF and save it on your device, or take a print-out for easy reference during your preparation.

content.text: If the PDF is temporarily unavailable on the official site, candidates should wait and re-check the website instead of relying on unofficial documents.

sections.heading: Rajasthan BSTC Pre DELED 2026 Official Links

content.text: Having all important links in one place helps users quickly navigate to the right page.

rows: Available under notifications on official site

content.text: Candidates should always double-check the URL in the browser address bar to ensure they are on the official website and not on any fake portal.

sections.heading: Rajasthan BSTC Pre DELED 2026 Preparation Tips

content.text: To make the most of the time before 20 May 2026, aspirants should follow a focused preparation strategy.

items: Make a realistic study plan: Divide the remaining days section-wise, giving more time to weak areas while revising strong topics regularly.
Prioritise Rajasthan GK: The General Awareness of Rajasthan section carries significant weight, so cover history, geography, culture, politics and economy of Rajasthan thoroughly.
Practice previous year papers: Solve previous years’ Rajasthan BSTC papers and sample questions to understand the level of questions and improve speed and accuracy.
Strengthen languages: Regular practice of grammar, comprehension, vocabulary and sentence formation for English and your chosen language (Hindi/Sanskrit) is essential.
Revise short notes: Prepare short notes for formulas, key facts and important points and revise them multiple times in the last weeks before the exam.

content.text: Maintaining a regular study routine, combining theory with practice tests and proper revision, will help candidates score well and secure a seat in a good D.El.Ed college.
